name: ton-ai-levlamclaw
description: LevlamClaw agent that streams OpenRouter responses to Telegram via TDLib

scripts.clean: npm run clean:core && npm run clean:tdlib && npm run clean:openrouter && npm run clean:agent
scripts.clean:agent: cd agents/levlamclaw && rm -rf dist node_modules package-lock.json
scripts.build:core: cd packages/core && npm install && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.build:tdlib: cd plugins/tdlib && npm install && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.build:openrouter: cd plugins/openrouter && npm install && npm run build && npm pack
scripts.copy-packages: mkdir -p agents/levlamclaw/node_modules/@ton-ai && cp packages/core/ton-ai-core-0.1.0.tgz agents/levlamclaw/node_modules/@ton-ai/ 2>/dev/null && cp plugins/tdlib/ton-ai-tdlib-0.1.0.tgz agents/levlamclaw/node_modules/@ton-ai/ 2>/dev/null && cp plugins/openrouter/ton-ai-openrouter-0.1.0.tgz agents/levlamclaw/node_modules/@ton-ai/ 2>/dev/null || echo 'Package copy completed'
scripts.rebuild: npm run clean && npm run build:core && npm run build:tdlib && npm run build:openrouter && npm run build:agent && npm run copy-packages
scripts.rebuild:quick: npm run build:core && npm run build:tdlib && npm run build:openrouter && npm run copy-packages && cd agents/levlamclaw && npm install
scripts.dev: npm run rebuild && npm run start:agent

author: testertesterov
